news.title: Fed Chair Warsh will be in the hot seat as lawmakers press for his read on the economy
news.summary: Kevin Warsh will testify before Congress for the first time as Fed chair this week. Lawmakers will want answers.

news.title: China evacuates more than one million people as Typhoon Bavi nears
news.summary: The storm is expected to weaken as it moves towards China, but it remains a risk as its rain bands encompass an area about the size of France.

news.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
news.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

news.title: This “Boring” ETF Could Be One of the Biggest Winners from the AI Boom
news.summary: AI runs on semiconductors, cloud platforms, and billions of lines of code, but it also runs on something far less glamorous. A 26-year-old defensive ETF may be sitting at the center of one of the most overlooked power plays in the entire AI boom.

news.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
news.summary: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

news.title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
news.summary: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.

news.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
news.summary: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

news.title: UAE defense firm EDGE Group wants to turn homegrown military tech into a global business
news.summary: EDGE Group CEO Hamad Al Marar discusses the UAE’s push to build a globally competitive defense industry — and how technology, manufacturing and exports are shaping that ambition.

news.title: Apple sues OpenAI for alleged theft of confidential info — and says that’s just ‘the tip of the iceberg’
news.summary: The iPhone maker claims “misconduct is normalized and exemplified by leadership” at OpenAI.

news.title: You Didn’t Need Alphabet: XLK Returned 29.35% to GOOGL’s 14.26%
news.summary: Alphabet crushed earnings, grew cloud revenue at a jaw-dropping pace, and dominated every tech headline in 2026. So why did the investor who never bought a single share of GOOGL end up with more money?

news.title: Meta’s stock roars back to life as it notches its best week in years
news.summary: Investors are bullish on Meta’s new low-cost AI pricing and infrastructure plans.

news.title: SK Hynix’s stock sees double-digit pop in Nasdaq debut
news.summary: The South Korean memory-chip company’s new American depositary receipts began trading on Friday and logged gains of nearly 13%.

news.title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
news.summary: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.

news.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq End Week Higher Following Strong SK Hynix Debut — META, SKHVY, CRCL, BA, DAL In Focus
news.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq gained for the second straight week, while the Dow recorded weekly losses.

news.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
news.summary: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

news.title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
news.summary: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.

news.title: Week’s Best: SpaceX Created an IPO Road Map
news.summary: It is estimated that the SpaceX IPO created more than 4,000 millionaires. SpaceX, which joined the Nasdaq-100 index on Tuesday, isn’t likely to be the only mega IPO this year. BlackRock joins the QQQ fray.

news.title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
news.summary: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions.”

news.title: My insurance company said my roof lost a few tiles. Loss adjusters found $10,000 in storm damage. How could this happen?
news.summary: “My house shook violently from the wind.”

news.title: XLE vs ICLN ETF Showdown Traditional Energy Meets Clean Energy. Which ETF Is the Better Buy?
news.summary: XLE's lower costs and higher yields appeal to value investors, while ICLN's global renewable exposure attracts those betting on the energy transition.
